title: TaskCompletion
description: Structured output schema for sub-agent task completion. Agents return this JSON after executing a work order.

task_id.description: The task ID from the work order

status.description: Whether the task was completed or is blocked

files_created.description: Paths of files created by this task

files_modified.description: Paths of existing files modified by this task

tests_passed.description: Whether all tests passed after implementation

notes.description: Context for the orchestrator (blocking reason if blocked, summary if done)
